notes: Bug fix — MASTER file picker would not open when replacing/re-importing an already-loaded Master on iOS Safari. Cause: the v1.6.71 device-PIN gate ran an 'await' before the file input's .click(); iOS only honors a programmatic file-picker click when it fires synchronously inside the tap gesture, so the await spent the gesture and the picker silently never opened (this happened even with no PIN set — the bare await was enough). Fix: the picker now opens synchronously on tap, and the destructive-replace guard runs as a post-selection preCommit hook in master_loadFromPicker. Protection is unchanged — PIN gate still required on PIN devices, destructive confirm still shown on no-PIN devices — only the timing moved to after a file is chosen. Side benefit: the loaded Master is no longer cleared until a new file is selected and the guard passes, so cancelling the picker leaves the current Master intact. Three functions touched: master_loadFromPicker (added opts.preCommit/onParseStart), master_loadFile, master_onReplaceTap. First-load path unchanged. Three stamps at v1.6.76.
